Ready, set, refer! https://cariuma.attn.tv/aVxluL2qQ7Cq

Warm, cozy, fall ready. The season to cozy up to the fire, sip on something hot, and slip into Oca Thermas has arrived. Kick your season off on the right foot with your new staple sneaker style.

Shop Now: cariuma.attn.tv/aHJk7njvRJV-

Cariuma: Redefining Everyday Style

Effortless by design, timeless in style-meet Catiba Pro 2.0.

Find Your Pair: cariuma.attn.tv/aUeO2jp85YIe

Cariuma: Your Fall Staples

Discover suede shoes crafted for autumn-versatile, polished, and ready for every moment → cariuma.attn.tv/aZKYFnUMwBiI

Cariuma: They're Back-and Ready for Fall

From crisp city walks to weekend escapes, your favorite suede high tops are restocked in all black and leopard. Durable, comfy, and made to go wherever fall takes you.

Shop Now: cariuma.attn.tv/akjyrf8tH-wB

Cariuma: Hi! It's Jonathan from Cariuma. We've added some new things to the site, a few we think you might like - reply to this text and let us know if you're looking for something new this season!

Don't forget you have Free Express Shipping on your order with code NEXTPAIR! https://cariuma.attn.tv/aP3n6_jOnjiU
You must be kidding I paid for three pairs of shoes which I never got. I keep emailing and calling no response. U owe me $300. RESPOND.

Cariuma: Sorry for the long wait and the lack of response. Our team has been receiving a high volume of messages and requests recently, but please rest assured that we are dedicated to giving every communication, including yours, the attention it deserves. In the meantime, kindly check your spam and promo folders as sometimes our emails end up there. We appreciate your patience.
It was sent 5 x starting in June. I want my shoes. I paid for them.

Cariuma: I'm so sorry to hear this and completely understand how frustrating it must be to still not have your shoes after so many attempts since June. Thank you for your patience.

Unfortunately, I'm not able to resolve this directly, as my system isn't set up for this type of issue. Our customer support team is best equipped to assist and will take great care of you. I know how frustrating this can be, but please note that emails are handled in the order they're received - sending additional ones may actually delay the response. Rest assured, one of my colleagues will follow up with you shortly. 
Happy to help.
I don't believe one thing u say. I want my shoes. There are a lot of people online that won't order from u anymore.

Cariuma: I understand where you're coming from, and I'm very sorry for all the inconvenience it has caused. This is surely not the experience we want you to have. Since you already emailed us, I can assure you that our team is doing its best to handle the situation in the best way possible. They should follow with you soon. Be sure to check your spam and promo folders. Sometimes the emails can end up there. We appreciate your understanding.
They don't end up there because they aren't being sent.

Cariuma: I'm really sorry for all the frustration this has caused. I'd kindly ask that you wait for the team's response. I'd love to sort this out for you myself, but my system has limited access, and the team will be able to give you the most accurate updates. Please know that one of my colleagues will be reaching out to you as soon.

Small wallet, big versatility. Holds up to 15 cards, coins, and bills with an accordion-style opening for easy access. In durable Axogrid fabric with RFID protection.

Text back if you have any questions!
ALPAKA: See something you like? Pick it up while it's still in stock! https://alpaka.attn.tv/aQrhyQhtb1bF
ALPAKA: See something you like? Pick it up while it's still in stock! alpaka.attn.tv/a7fJ9jKdLFkX
What is main difference between this and the other totes?

ALPAKA: The Metro Tote stands out as a sleek, structured, and weatherproof everyday carry designed for city life and work. Unlike the more casual Elements Tote series, the Metro Tote offers a secure zip closure, organized internal layout, and dedicated space for a 16" laptop-making it ideal for commuters and professionals who need function and style in one streamlined bag. Hope this helps!
Is Metro Tote more robust/durable than Elements Totes and more protective for camera gear?

ALPAKA: Yes, the Metro Tote is generally more robust and protective than the Elements Totes, especially for carrying items like camera gear.

The Metro Tote is made with weatherproof Axoflux 210D fabric, features a fleece-lined laptop sleeve, and has a structured build with zippered closure, offering more protection and durability overall. It's designed with urban commuting and tech organization in mind, which makes it better suited for safely carrying sensitive gear like cameras.
And how does the Metro Tote compare to the Bravo Tote besides the included shoulder strap?

ALPAKA: The Metro Tote is more structured and weatherproof, ideal for urban use, while the Bravo Tote offers a more casual, spacious design. Both have shoulder straps, but the Metro Tote focuses on tech organization.
Thank you ! How do I apply my points to the purchase of a Metro Tote?

ALPAKA: Good question! To apply your points toward the purchase, just make sure you're logged into your ALPAKA account first. Then, add the item to your cart and head to checkout. You should see an option to apply your reward points before completing the payment. If you have any questions, feel free to shoot me a text.

I ended up buying Metro Tote but no option to apply reward points. Can you apply points for me?
Thanks
ALPAKA: Thank you for your purchase. I'm sorry to hear about that. The best way to handle this is to contact us directly here https://alpaka.attn.tv/aXsT6mszTTmY Our team is happy to help!
Failure- they were no help at all. They pretty much said better luck next time 😡
ALPAKA: I am about this, it's not the experience I want you to have with us. I'm afraid my system is limited so there isn't much I can do on my side. So sorry for the inconvenience!

send_to_cs: No escalations for this client, send to CS using the Support templates
For post-purchase inquiries send to CS using the Support template (shortcut: ESC)
➜ If the cx is having difficulties sending an email to CS via the link in the ESC temp - use Support 2 template (shortcut: TESC)
➜ If the cx is facing technical website issues while accessing the link, do NOT immediately send the TESC shortcut, troubleshoot first instead
For pre-purchase inquiries send to CS using the Support 2 template (shortcut: TESC)
tone: 🅿️ Use wording that is in line with the brand's voice and terminology found on the website
➜ e.g. Nova Kids, Nova Babes, Insta-worthy, slays, snatched, baddie, etc.
➜ Always look up the term's meaning before using it!
templates: For expired discounts use EXP shortcut
For login issues use LGI shortcut
promo_and_exclusions: If cx are looking for their 30% welcome code, ask to check their email (spam & promo)
Gift cards can be used on discounted items

promotions.title: 10% off Welcome Code & 15% off Winback Code
content:
• Use the link in the automated message 

• You must have your VPN on

• It will autogenerate a banner on the top of the LAKE home page with the discount code 

• The code doesn't automatically apply at checkout

send_to_cs: For any inquiries about the price changes, use the temp "Why has the price changed?"
For any inquiries about the wildfires in LA affecting shipping rerouthing, send to CS
tone: Be clear about the sales schedules and policies
Avoid conveying that we have a lot of sales or promotions
templates: If cx's ask when/how often do we have sales, use DHS shortcut
➜  🅿️ You can mention free shipping for anything $75+
For price adjustment inquiries, use PAE shortcut
drive_to_purchase: Always suggest another option if what they want is out
Do not DTP before the start of a sale!

escalation_preferences: Order Issues: mispacks, defectives, lost packages

conversation.message_text: LAKE: Reply Y to subscribe to recurring automated personalized marketing alerts (e.g. cart reminders) from LAKE.
LAKE: Welcome to LAKE! Msg & data rates may apply. Msg frequency varies. Reply HELP for help, STOP to cancel.
LAKE: Thanks for joining. Take 10% off your first order when you click here: https://lakepajamas.attn.tv/aGAc7qfZvEgL .
LAKE: Don't forget to save our contact to get exclusive updates! Text us back anytime with questions to reach our text exclusive concierge, Lucy!
What's the discount code for 10% off
LAKE: For the 10% off Welcome Code, use the link in the automated message; you must have your VPN on. It will autogenerate a banner at the top of the LAKE home page with the discount code.

send_to_cs: Send to CS for legal and fraud related inquires
Send to CS for product safety inquires and threats
Send to CS for website technical issues
escalate: ESC if cx claims bodily injury as result of a product
ESC if cx highlights dangers to health/safety as a result of product
templates: For all post-purchase & warranty inquiries use "SUPPORT" temp (SPT)
For discount code issues use "SUPPORT" temp (SPT)
For product info that you can't find on the site use "SUPPORT" temp (SPT)
If cx reach out about 90 qt cooler recall, use shortcut RCC
For custom order cancellation and edit requests, don't use CED, use the designated templates instead

conversation.message_text: Igloo: Welcome to Igloo! Msg & data rates may apply. Msg frequency varies. Reply HELP for help, STOP to cancel.
Igloo: Hey this is Sarah, how can I help you?
If i order a WWE cooler belt will it be here before xmas
Template used: "Guarantee delivery dates - All brands"; last updated: 2024-11-07 14:26:32.728
Template used: "Shipping time"; last updated: 2025-05-12 20:11:21.696

Igloo: I'm really sorry, but I can't guarantee exact delivery dates, only an estimate in business days. This is just in case the carrier runs into any unexpected delays along the way. I appreciate your understanding! On average, order processing can take 24-48 hours, and we usually ship via FedEx. Once shipped, it will take 3-6 business days for domestic orders. 
Customization takes a little extra time, but it's worth the wait! Expect about 5 to 7 days from the time you place your order to when it ships out. 
Keep in mind, we don't offer expedited shipping right now.
